title: dryopteris omeiensis var. flexilis
intro: Dryopteris omeiensis var. flexilis is a variety of the Omei fern, a species of fern native to China. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure and reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infused in hot water, and it can also be dried and used in herbal supplements.
